name: CH32V005E6R6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32V005 parser pipeline for CH32V005E6R6 QSOP24. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-2 CH32V005 Pin definitions. CH32V005E6R6 is a CH32V005 MCU in a 24-pin QSOP24 package. This generated definition includes 8 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 8 input channels, 1 I2C bus, 1 op-amp, 1 SPI bus, and 2 serial ports.

peripherals.label: ADC
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 8 analog input channels and an injected trigger input and a regular trigger input. Supports 2 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: I2C1
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals. Supports 4 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: OPA1
peripherals.description: On-chip operational amplifier with a positive input, a negative input, and an analog output. Supports 4 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: SPI1
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals. Supports 7 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: TIM1
peripherals.description: TIM1 peripheral with 9 configurable signals. Supports 10 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: TIM2
peripherals.description: TIM2 peripheral with 5 configurable signals. Supports 8 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: USART1
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with TX, RX, CTS, and RTS signals. Supports 9 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: USART2
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with TX, RX, CTS, and RTS signals. Supports 7 pin-routing options.
